modmenu.descriptionTranslation.copycoord: CopyCoords be a client-side Fabric mod fer copyin', convertin', and sharin' coordinates at full sail speed.
option.copycoords.copyToClipboard: Stash ye coords in clipboard chest
option.copycoords.copyToClipboard@Toolti: If hoisted, /copycoords plunders yer coordinates and stuffs 'em in the system clipboard chest after shoutin' in chat.
option.copycoords.copyConvertedToClipboa: Stash swabbled coords in clipboard chest
If hoisted, /convertcoords plunders yer swabbled coordinates and stuffs 'em in the clipboard chest.
option.copycoords.showDimensionInCoordin: If hoisted, the realm (Overworld, Nether, End) be shown whenever ye yoink coordinates.
option.copycoords.coordinateFormat@Toolt: Choose how ye scribble coordinates: Space (100 64 200), Bracket ([100, 64, 200]), or XYZ (X:100 Y:64 Z:200).
option.copycoords.coordinateTemplate@Too: Write yer own cursed coordinate scroll. Placeholders: {x}, {y}, {z}, {dimension}, {dimName}. Leave it blank to use the format above. Preview appears while scribblin'.
option.copycoords.pasteToChatInput@Toolt: If hoisted, copied coordinates be dropped into chat input instead o' sendin' or stashin'.
option.copycoords.instantChatEnabled@Too: If hoisted, /cc and /copycoords blast their coordinate loot straight into server chat.
option.copycoords.showInstantChatSendUnb: If hoisted, shows a one-time chat squawk when Instant Chat Send has no key bound.
option.copycoords.chatCoordinateDetectio: If hoisted, CopyCoords scans incoming chat fer coordinate triples and posts an action line fer quick plunder.
Max sniffed coord sets per message bottle
Caps how many detected coordinate action lines CopyCoords shows fer one incoming message bottle.
message.copycoords.command.no_player: Cannot read position - no scallywag loaded aboard!
message.copycoords.command.copied: Aye! Coordinates stashed in clipboard chest.
message.copycoords.command.copy_failed: Blimey! Failed to stash coordinates in clipboard chest: %s
message.copycoords.keybind.copied: Aye! Coordinates stashed in clipboard chest: %s
message.copycoords.keybind.copied_conver: Aye! Swabbled coordinates stashed in clipboard chest: %s
message.copycoords.keybind.copied_with_d: Aye! Coordinates wi' realm stashed in clipboard chest: %s
message.copycoords.keybind.failed: Blimey! Failed to stash coordinates in clipboard chest: %s
message.copycoords.instant_chat_send_unb: [CopyCoords] Instant Chat Send be unbound, ye landlubber. Bind a key in Controls!
message.copycoords.command.converted: Swabbled coordinates off the starboard bow: %s
message.copycoords.command.unknown_goal: Unknown target realm: %s (use overworld or nether, matey)
message.copycoords.command.unsupported_d: Ye cannot convert coords in this cursed realm (only Overworld and Nether be supported).
message.copycoords.bookmark.import_faile: Blast! Failed to haul bookmarks aboard: %s
